name: kitcounterpartygrid
description: Project containing your PowerApps Component Framework (PCF) control.

comments.overrides: Pin the Fluent v9 tabster chain to the model-driven host's platform-library floor (9.68.0 -> react-tabster 9.26.1 -> tabster 8.5.5). The host shares a single tabster instance on window; a newer bundled tabster (8.8.0) augments that instance with a shape it doesn't have and throws, blanking the control. Matching the host's versions keeps the shared instance compatible.
